media_header_sample.note: Five IEEE-float WAV files rejected by Python's PCM-only wave module parsed correctly through Mutagen WAVE metadata.

verified_corrections: cassan is an SD1 image LoRA, not an audio or RVC model
LTX2-i2v-OralSuite and ltxdeepthroat are LTX2-family AV LoRAs
ltx2NSFWFoleyAddAudio_v1 is a workflow template rather than an audio sample pack
Stable Audio Open has no local model weights
FreeVC is missing its main conversion checkpoint and WavLM-Large payload
CosyVoice2 and Parler-TTS local metadata declare Apache-2.0
OpenNSFW SFX terms state CC-BY-4.0, commercial use, attribution, and no repackaging
workflow templates reference models and custom nodes absent from the download root
next_implementation: Index OpenNSFW SFX, then execute one real Parler-TTS or CosyVoice2 dialogue plus foley chain through the existing Wave64 evaluators.
